description: Portrait announcement graphic. The image is a studio photograph of a smiling middle-aged man (Markwayne Mullin) with short brown hair and a trimmed reddish-brown beard, wearing a navy suit, white shirt, patterned red and blue tie, and a U.S. flag lapel pin. Behind him are an American flag on the left and the blue-and-white Department of Homeland Security seal on the right. Across the lower third, in large white capitals, is the name 'MARKWAYNE MULLIN', and beneath it in smaller spaced white capitals 'SECRETARY of HOMELAND SECURITY' (with 'of' in italics). Posted by the ICE account.
notable_text: MARKWAYNE MULLIN; SECRETARY of HOMELAND SECURITY
